wsod-typescript-build-failure.description: White Screen of Death caused by TypeScript build errors
detectionSignals: React DevTools shows no components mounted
preventionMechanisms: Run 'npm run build' before claiming success
Check TypeScript compiler output for errors

jsx-syntax-errors.description: Invalid JSX syntax causing build failures

component-interface-mismatches.description: Component prop interfaces not matching expected types
prevention: Generate prop type definitions from actual usage

mandatoryTests.name: TypeScript Build Success Test
mandatoryTests.description: Ensures TypeScript compilation completes without errors

mandatoryTests.name: Component Render Smoke Test
mandatoryTests.description: Validates all components can render without crashing
mandatoryTests.implementation: Mount each component in test environment

mandatoryTests.name: Import Resolution Test
mandatoryTests.description: Ensures all import statements resolve correctly
mandatoryTests.implementation: Test module loading for all source files

cicdIntegration: Add TypeScript checking to pre-commit hooks
Add browser smoke tests to CI pipeline
Monitor for white screen errors in production
